Simple, Transparent Pricing

No long-term contracts. No surprise invoices. No hidden fees. Pay for what you need — stop when you don't.

White Glove Managed IT

$199/mo

Unlimited support. Real humans. SLA-backed.

  • Remote monitoring 24/7
  • SLA-backed response times
  • Dedicated technician
  • Proactive security patching
  • Security baseline hardening
  • No per-ticket fees
Get Started →

Hardware-as-a-Service (HaaS)

$149/mo

Per device — enterprise hardware. Zero upfront. Zero e-waste.

  • Refurbished enterprise hardware
  • Kecktech-branded device tags
  • Remote management
  • Hardware refresh cycle included
  • Responsible device recycling
  • No upfront cost
Get Started →

AI Custom App Development

$3K–$8K

You own the code. Forever. No license fees.

  • Custom-built to your workflow
  • You own 100% of the code
  • AI-powered automation
  • Kansas-hosted on Kecktech infrastructure
  • No recurring license fees
  • ROI payback < 18 months
Get Started →

Senior Technology Concierge

$79/mo

Dignity-first tech support. Plain English always.

  • Scam & fraud protection
  • Device setup & optimization
  • Monthly check-in calls
  • Plain-English support
  • Remote access for quick fixes
  • Emergency tech card
Get Started →
Common Questions

FAQ

Are there long-term contracts?

No. All monthly services are month-to-month — cancel any time with 30 days notice. App development projects have a one-time project agreement with no ongoing obligation.

What payment methods do you accept?

ACH bank transfer, check, and all major credit cards. Monthly service invoices are sent by email on the 1st of each month.

Do you serve clients outside Kansas?

Yes — all remote services (White Glove IT, AI App Development, and Senior Technology Concierge) are available nationwide. HaaS hardware deployment is currently Kansas and surrounding region.

Can I bundle services?

Yes — and we offer discounts for clients on two or more services. Contact us to discuss a custom package for your situation.

What about private hosting?

Sovereign Private Hosting is coming soon — launching with our solar-powered Kansas facility. Join our mailing list or donate to the build to get early access.

Not Sure Which Service Fits?

Tell us about your situation — we'll recommend the right fit with no pressure and no sales pitch.

Let's Talk →

Solar-Powered. Sovereign Data.
AI-Built Apps. Disability-Led. Human-Centered.
